case_title: GABRIEL KAWIKA WHITE VS. DJG & ASSOCIATES, INC., A MICHIGAN CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, GABRIEL KAWIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DJG & ASSOCIATES, INC., A MICHIGAN CORPORATION GOSWAMI, SUKAMAL AN INDIVIDUAL $4,415.57 PRINCIPAL, $10.13 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,579.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
